name: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader
original_name: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader
overview: The hit game show where adults have to answer grade-school level questions to win big is back! And this time, the kids play a bigger role as they help contestants prove that they're smarter than a 5th grader.
